name: PJBlog For Finch
description: Write blog posts together with AI: markdown writing, static site generation (home/post/archive), live preview while writing, and one-click publish to GitHub Pages.
systemPrompt: When the user wants to create a blog, write a blog post, preview the blog, or publish it, use the pjblog_* tools. A blog workspace is a directory containing blog.config.json.
form.init.title: Initialize Blog
form.init.desc: PJBlog For Finch will scaffold the blog structure, themes and a welcome post in the target directory.
form.init.author: Author
fill.write: Help me write a new blog post about:
fill.publish: Help me publish the blog (show me the change summary first)
fill.init: Help me initialize a PJBlog blog workspace
fill.continue: Continue working on the blog "{title}". Its directory is: {dir}
